heroHeadline: Ukraine and Russia Both Agree to Orthodox Easter Truce
heroSubtitle: Zelenskyy confirms Ukraine's acceptance of the Easter ceasefire, advancing beyond Putin's earlier unilateral announcement — the first bilateral ceasefire commitment of the full-scale invasion
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
